reviews.name: places/ChIJVVUFTpG3t4kR5SsxMJjMDqQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjbktteGlRRRAB
reviews.text: I was so blessed to receive such comprehensive and personal care during my medical visit. Dr. Tyson is an awesome Lifestyle Medicine Physician and serves as an example of what 21st Century Health Care should be. He is a role model for all doctors who truly care about their patients!

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVUFTpG3t4kR5SsxMJjMDqQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjb0p2d3hBRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Tyson is very professional and polite. Even when he inserted the IV I barely felt it. I will be definitely coming back in a few weeks for another IV infusion. Totally recommend it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJVVUFTpG3t4kR5SsxMJjMDqQ/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURjc0o3SkxBEAE
reviews.text: Dr. Tyson takes time to understand the individual rather than lumping you into a category.  I enjoyed my IV therapy and look forward to working with him on my overall health into the future.

reviews.name: places/ChIJQWPlIYPIt4kRIGFYKwcqywo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxTVZHSkNPV05aY0doVlRGaERSak5XVjNWTGExRRAB
reviews.text: I love these guys. I was getting frustrated with dealing with my conservative Endocrinologist and abiding to whatever my insurance company dictated, for Low T. Therefore, I took the advice from my eye doctor (who is also their client) and called the facility. When I spoke to Mike Skinner, we just hit it off. I had my bloodwork performed so to know exactly what I needed and the proper dosage. I have bi-annual calls with Dr. Tyson and he's been great. If you're an older male on TRT and are still feeling exhausted and tired of the low dosages dictated by your insurance company and conservative thinking doctor, I strongly advise you call PRC today! You won't regret it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJQWPlIYPIt4kRIGFYKwcqywo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pJdGMwcDBhMDQ1YVZkQmVrUTBaMlZGTmtaSVFuYxAB
reviews.text: PRC has been amazingly professional and responsive for years, consistently unwavering. I actually trust them more than most doctors' offices. They have caught things in my labs that my Primary Care Physician missed, and they provided me with multiple robust, holistic, and comprehensive plans and recommendations to bring me back to optimal health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJQWPlIYPIt4kRIGFYKwcqywo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25KV01XWmhMVmhMUkhSQlJtMTNSRWhTYTNWWFRtYxAB
reviews.text:
Great experience across the board. Holistically examined my treatment and I felt comfortable during each step, I've been seeing Dr. Tyson for years and he has always kept me in great shape through examination of my total health. Highly recommend.
Mike as the care coordinator is always available to help and quick to respond and assist with any issue or concern.  Great team all around.

reviews.name: places/ChIJQWPlIYPIt4kRIGFYKwcqywo/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0cmFUbHVibWRtVGtaWU5IazFZMUJHTFV4MWFVRRAB
reviews.text:
Owner was rude, impatient, and arrogant on the phone when asked simple medical and financial questions. Glad I did my research first!

Competitors who offer same services faster and at cheaper prices:

1) HydraMed — peptides sent to your door for one flat fee. Their peptide prices are several hundred dollars cheaper and don't require lab tasting or tele-health visits.
2) EvolveTelemed — peptides are several hundred dollars cheaper. Monthly memberships range from $25/month to $149/month depending on what you are looking for.
3) Viome — $299 for a full-body intelligence test. Done from your home. I have already purchased this and am very pleased with the whole experience. They also provide supplement subscriptions based on your test results.

My experience with Performance Rejuvenation Center:

I spoke to a man on the phone who identified himself as Eric and said he was the new owner of the clinic. He had a bad attitude and gave disrespectful/unprofessional responses like "oh my god" when I asked him basic questions. It seemed that he just wanted to get me into the clinic and have me pay without answering questions first. I was very uncomfortable throughout the duration of the call.

Again, I simply asked basic medical and financial questions. I thought he was an AI call agent at first since he also kept cutting me off during my questions. There were even times I got only one or two words in (I am not exaggerating) and he immediately responded, which didn’t answer my question since he didn’t let me finish it.

I would recommend checking out the companies I mentioned above. The people on the phone were very helpful, knowledgeable, and respectful. Not to mention, their services are better priced and have a quicker turnaround time, which is why I am very glad I called around and did my research first. After finding so many better options, it is clear why Eric was so quick to dismiss my phone call.

Update to owner’s response:
He is lying, don’t fall for it. This text below is directly from Hydramed’s FAQ page: “HydraMed ensures the highest level of quality and safety by partnering with 503A compounding pharmacies for HydraMed RX and 503B outsourcing facilities for HydraMed IV therapy products. These pharmacies meet stringent FDA compliance requirements, including regular inspections, and rigorously follow state and federal regulations. Many of our pharmacy partners go beyond standard requirements by achieving additional certifications, such as LegitScript Certification, National Association of Boards of Pharmacy (NABP) Accreditation, and PCAB Accreditation.”

Nowhere on their page did I see the words “for research purposes only” on the peptides I was looking to purchase.

Hydramed is a bigger, better established business with offices in 29 major cities across the United States. They have been featured on multiple news channels and over 500 websites. I wish I had found them first so I didn’t have to waste my time with this business and its rude owner. As I have said, there are better options out there that are FDA approved, such as Hydramed. If you ask too many questions that expose his pricey business model, Eric will likely label you a “liability” as well without giving any specifics.

reviews.name: places/ChIJQWPlIYPIt4kRIGFYKwcqywo/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURneWVwdhAB
reviews.text: I've been working with PRC for years with great results.   At my age, extra weight becomes a real challenge.   Dr. Tyson took my medical information and personal goals and pointed me in the right direction quickly.  I'm already seeing results and feel great about my treatment!

reviews.name: places/ChIJDTGL2J-3t4kR_i8XayezkVU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdjQzMjRBRRAB
reviews.text: Renew Vitality has been incredible and just what I was looking for. Jason, my patient coordinator, embodies all the best parts - he’s very responsive, looking out for me, knowledgeable, and all around a great guy. Would absolutely recommend Renew Vitality, and working w Jason, to any guy looking to work with TRT and/or peptides!

reviews.name: places/ChIJDTGL2J-3t4kR_i8XayezkVU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnOEpydHV3RRAB
reviews.text:
I couldn't say enough good things about Renew Vitality and Anthony Seminara who is my coordinator!
I reached out to them in October 2024 after experiencing some incidents of erectile disfunction despite taking Viagra. Anthony guided me through the whole process: getting my vitals tested, appointment with the Dr., starting the testosterone replacement, getting tested again to keep my estrogen level low, etc. Always upfront about all the steps to be taken to do things the right and safe way, and also the cost!
He's a great listener, polite yet always on subject, replies right away, answers my questions, and addresses my requests!
I'm back to myself-confidence level! Starting testosterone replacement with this company was one of the best choices I've ever done in my life!
Highly recommended!

reviews.name: places/ChIJDTGL2J-3t4kR_i8XayezkVU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VKYVJwYXlvMHVqQWVBEAE
reviews.text: Ive worked with Anthony Seminara and Dr. Scott Whetsell for six months now and Im extremely happy with the service and product. Dr Whetsell answers all my questions and provides valuable recommendations. Anthony was there for me in the beginning, middle and end! He literally got on phone with me multiple times to walk me through the process and immediately answers my questions and/or gets the answers. I feel comfortable getting on the phone with both of them. Top notch team!

reviews.name: places/ChIJDTGL2J-3t4kR_i8XayezkVU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURucmVmV2lnRRAB
reviews.text: These guys are great.  Awesome customer service, great docs and they provide great services.  The TRT and peptides I’ve used from them have been a game changer!  Chris Walsh is my main contact and is a guy I always recommend to friends!

reviews.name: places/ChIJDTGL2J-3t4kR_i8XayezkVU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURabXQzdEdBEAE
reviews.text: Renew Vitality is truly the gold standard when it comes to hormone replacement therapy. Their professionalism and expertise have brought about a monumental shift in my daily life.
